title: De pecado en pecado
writer: José María Carretero, Esther Fernández, Luis Manrique
actors: Miguel Aceves Mejía, Victorio Blanco, Lupe Carriles
plot: This post-World War II drama, (released to a world-wide audience on July 9, 1949), is definitively unique for the caliber of each of its contributing writers, who are clearly better-known for their cinematic talents in black and w...
